name: Kotarou Tennouji
description: Kotarou is the protagonist of Rewrite. He is a high school student with a frivolous personality and is known to be arrogant. Though not fully realizing it himself, he meddles in the business of others, and as such tends to get easily drawn into incidents. The beginning of Rewrite centers around Kotarou's antics in his attempt to revive his school's Occult Club. ~!Kotarou suffered from an accident when he was young, which caused him to sustain brain damage and suffer from amnesia. name: Morihito Otogi
description: __Height:__ 181 cm (5'11") An ogre. Strong and level-headed, he's had his hands full ever since his childhood friend [Nico](https://anilist.co/character/207345/) returned. Nico's nickname for him is "Moi."

name: Riko Akutsu
description: Akutsu is Ooyama's delinquent classmate who constantly hangs out in his room to read manga, play video games, and eat snacks. ~!While she likes to tease Ooyama, she slowly develops romantic feelings towards him, especially after Ooyama makes statements like pleading her to stay and not wanting her to go off with any other guys.!~

name: Tatsuya Fukuda
description: __Height:__ 176 cm Director of Tokyo City Esperion FC Youth, and Head Coach of the A Team. He was born in Ehime, Japan but moved to Tokyo to attend high school. He joined Tokyo City Esperion FC of the J-League (Japan's top professional football league) at the age of 18 and became a regular at 20. At 23 he was signed by the Spanish club Sabadell FC who had been recently promoted to Spain's top division, La Liga. A while later, his mother married [Hana Ichijou](https://anilist.co/character/162035/

name: Tomohito Sugino
description: He is one of the students and Nagisa's close friends. He used to be a basketball player in their school's basketball club until he was assigned into class 3-E, making him kicked out from the club. He dreams to become a professional baseball player like his idol, Arita, and emulates his techniques to improve his own performance in baseball and is shown to very dedicated to it. He also sometimes used his baseball techniques in his attempts to kill Korosensei. He has a crush on Yukiko.

name: William Macbeth

During Leo and Black’s lunch together, it is established that the two have a lot in common, especially when it comes to having low self-esteem. name: Ayano Hanesaki
description: Hanesaki Ayano is the protagonist of Hanebado! and a 1st year member of the Kitakomachi badminton club. ~!She is Hanesaki Uchika's daughter and Connie Christensen's adoptive sister.!~

name: Kojirou Sasaki
description: He was summoned by Caster as a guardian and watchmen for the front gate of the Ryudo Temple. As an improper servant, Assassin is entirely dependent on Caster for mana and cannot move freely beyond the grounds of Ryudoji. Furthermore, he lacks most of the usual parameters and abilities granted to his class. Because of his limited status, Assassin cares little for the Holy Grail, and outside of his duties to Caster, he only seeks to enjoy a decent sword fight. (from Wikipedia)

name: Seraphim
description: __Height__: 173 cm Seraphim, "Sera" for short, is a well-endowed vampire ninja (吸血忍者, Kyūketsu-ninja) who combines her Tsubamegaeshi secret sword technique (秘剣 燕返し, Hiken Tsubamegaeshi?) and ninja reflexes with her vampire powers to fight her enemies. She is able to form a pair of bat wings and a katana out of several leaves. As a vampire, she periodically requires blood to stay alive, and can anesthetize people with a kiss in order to numb the pain from neck bites. She does this with other girl

name: Shen Long
description: Shen Long is the wish granting dragon of Earth. The Shen Long of the Black Star Dragon Balls is red, opposed to the Shen Long of Earth who is green. Shen Long can be summoned by gathering all seven of the Dragon Balls of Earth. Shen Long can bestow any wish as long as it does not exceed the power of his creator, who must be still alive (i.e. Kami or Dende). name: Italia
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5’8”) The beloved and favorite grandson of the once great Roman Empire, North Italy, better known as just “Italy,” can be described as nonetheless, a failure in following in his grandpa’s footsteps and a complete crybaby. He is often called “Veneziano” because he represents the northern half of the country. name: Izumi Shimomura
description: __Height:__ 155 cm Izumi Shimomura is an Ajin. Her name is taken from her birth father's last name (Shimomura) and her mother's maiden name (Izumi). Her former name was Yoko Tainaka. Izumi is a rather quiet and reserved individual, talking mainly when informing Tosaki about something. Her answers are usually short and to the point. Even though she is an Ajin, she chose to live between humans in secret and doesn't seem to be consumed completely by resentment towards humans despite her background.

name: Mahiru Kouzuki
description: Mahiru is a typical high school girl who follows the philosophy of "nothing matters." Despite being sensitive, she often gets upset over small things, although she truly cares about others. When she was young, Mahiru used to draw illustrations under the pseudonym "Kurage Yoru." However, something happened that made her stop for a while. Now, she struggles with feeling different and tries to blend in with everyone else. But then, she meets Kano, and everything changes. name: Saphentite Neikes
nativeName: サーフェンティット・ネイクス
description: Saphentite (Sapphee) is a member of the lamia species; a half humanoid, half serpent, monster. She herself suffers from albinism, and therefore takes precautions such as wearing sun-resistant clothing, covering her face in a veil, and sometimes utilizing an umbrella. She works with Dr. Glenn at the Litbeit clinic as a fellow doctor, but is usually content to resign herself to the status of Dr. Glenn's personal assistant.
